meaning: adj.用显微镜可见的,精微的
examples: Microscopic examination of a cell's chromosomes can reveal the sex of the fetus.
Phytoplankton are microscopic plants that grow in the ocean.
Even today, microscopic meteorites continually bombard Earth, falling on both land and sea.
The dust is made of a honeycomb structure of cells like microscopic golf balls.
The quality of pictures is measured in pixels microscopic points of color per square inch.
